{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":596098,"duration_api_ms":602529,"ttft_ms":3266,"num_turns":38,"result":"Review complete. Verdict: **PASS_WITH_FINDINGS** — does not block pack or goal closeout.

**Core conclusion:** CP00-853's descriptor-only evidence accurately supports its `production_ready:false / in_progress` self-claim. The marketplace source, contract, validators, validation script, and tests are internally consistent and fail-closed; the CP853 binding/requirements exactly match the planned 40-unit distribution; the no-write/no-real-data attestation and the read-only-Claude / human-final-approval / Hermes-no-runtime authority boundaries all hold in code. Review hardening is correctly applied — the API-500 primary receipt and 3 prior attempts are quarantined as invalid and uncounted, with no failed/malformed output laundered as valid.

**No P0/P1.** Three non-blocking, harness-enforced findings:
- **P2** — full 10-command validation suite not yet run (by design, post-review); closeout must stay gated on it.
- **P3** — `construction-inspection.json` under-reports the invalid attempts vs manifest/claude-review-result.
- **P3** — the one valid review receipt still needs to be persisted (current primary receipt is the API-500 invalid).

Read-only inspection of the nine active implementation refs confirms the production-readiness claim is accurately scoped: the manifest declares production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / in_progress and only descriptor-level evidence is asserted. The marketplace source (registry.js, validators.js, model.js, states.js, index.js), contract JSON, validation script, and tests are internally consistent and fail-closed. The CP853 binding (registry.js:190-205) and requirements (registry.js:674-714) match the planned 40-unit distribution exactly (impl 16 / test 8 / ui 4 / security_audit 4 / failure_recovery 4 / contract 2 / claude_review 2; micro-titles Test-And-Golden-Case 10 / Hermes 22 / Claude-Review 8), and the manifest's 40 included_units sum identically. validateMarketplaceCp853EvidenceReviewPacketDescriptor (validators.js:1063-1131) enforces per-row descriptor_only + runtime_execution=false and rejects connector secrets, OAuth tokens, prompt/completion payloads, real client data, permission-decision detail, audit bodies, runtime opening, and product-state writes; MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION is mirrored in source and contract projection. Authority boundaries hold: Claude is read-only and explicitly not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, read_only=true), human approval is required for runtime opening (deferred to next pack CP00-854 via runtime_opening_pack_id), Hermes emits no runtime receipt (emits_runtime_receipt=false), and local validation does not claim enterprise trust. Review hardening is correctly applied: the primary review-receipt.json and three prior attempts are infrastructure failures (API 500 / auth-CLI errors) all quarantined as invalid_review with valid_review_receipts empty; no malformed or tool-shaped output is laundered as valid. The changed-file-scope correctly isolates the nine active refs and preserves unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook, docx) as out-of-scope. No P0/P1 defects found. Remaining items are non-blocking and harness-enforced: the full 10-command validation suite runs post-review by design (only rp28:marketplace:validate and the marketplace model tests have run, both exit 0), exactly one valid hardened review receipt must be persisted, and construction-inspection.json minorly under-reports the invalid attempts. blocks_goal_closeout=false because the pack explicitly closes runtime/enterprise-trust/final-approval rather than claiming them.","findings":[{"id":"CP853-R-01","severity":"P2","title":"Full validation suite not yet executed at review time (post-review gate)","file":"docs/closeout-packs/cp00-853/command-evidence.json","line":5,"details":"command-evidence.json status is pending_full_validation with gate_outcome pending_valid_review_and_full_validation. Only two commands have run: npm run rp28:marketplace:validate (exit 0) and node --test packages/marketplace/test/*.test.js (exit 0). The ten validation commands listed in the prompt and review-baseline (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) have not been executed. This is the pack's documented sequence (full validation runs after exactly one valid hardened read-only Claude review), so it is not a defect in the descriptor evidence, but it is a genuine outstanding gate before production_ready can be flipped to true.","recommendation":"Keep production_ready=true gated on the full 10-command validation suite passing after this valid review receipt is recorded; do not close out on the review verdict alone.","post_review_disposition":"Non-blocking for this read-only review; closeout remains conditional on the harness running the full suite post-review (independently enforced via gate_outcome)."},{"id":"CP853-R-02","severity":"P3","title":"construction-inspection.json under-reports invalid review attempts","file":"docs/closeout-packs/cp00-853/construction-inspection.json","line":20,"details":"construction-inspection.json records invalid_review_attempts: [] while manifest.json (pack_level_claude_review.invalid_review_attempts) and claude-review-result.json each enumerate CP853-invalid-attempt-01/02/03, and the primary review-receipt.json is itself a fourth invalid (API 500) execution. The inspection artifact correctly reports verdict PENDING_REVIEW and pack_level_claude_review_completed=false, so this is a cosmetic enumeration mismatch, not an over-claim of validity.","recommendation":"Synchronize the invalid-attempt list across manifest.json, claude-review-result.json, and construction-inspection.json so all three reflect the same quarantined attempts.","post_review_disposition":"Cosmetic; does not affect review-validity gating or the production_ready claim."},{"id":"CP853-R-03","severity":"P3","title":"Primary review receipt currently holds an invalid (API 500) review; one valid receipt must be persisted before closeout","file":"artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-853/review-receipt.json","line":5,"details":"review-receipt.json status is invalid_review / valid_review=false / closeout_eligible=false (api_error_status 500), and manifest valid_review_receipts is empty with exactly_one_valid_pack_review_required=true. The hardening correctly refuses to count this failed execution. Closeout requires persisting exactly one valid hardened read-only review receipt (this review) and updating manifest.valid_review_receipts accordingly.","recommendation":"Persist this valid review as the single accepted pack-level review receipt, keep the prior failed executions quarantined, and update the manifest/adjudication finding_counts from null to the reported values.","post_review_disposition":"Expected next step in the documented sequence; correctly gated and non-blocking for the review verdict itself."}],"finding_counts":{"p0":0,"p1":0,"p2":1,"p3":2,"reported_p0":0,"reported_p1":0,"reported_p2":1,"reported_p3":2}},"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"ea1dbd87-2233-499c-aee1-82d8fdbd1467"}
